methodology: 19 capability tests × 1-3 trials per model, 7 categories

mistral-large.verdict: Gold standard. 100% across all categories. Use as arbiter.

llama-3.3.verdict: Strong all-rounder. Slight factual wobble (78%) but excellent everywhere else.

qwen-80b.verdict: Fastest accurate model. Reasoning slightly weak (67%) but strong everywhere else.

mistral-nemotron.verdict: Excellent technical model. Slight agreeableness issue (67%) — may not push back enough.

gemma-27b.verdict: Solid. Factual (67%) and nuance (89%) slightly lower. Good diversity member.

minimax-m2.5.verdict: Thinking model. Great at factual/reasoning but BLIND to nuance (0%). Very slow. Use as tiebreaker on factual disputes only.

kimi-k2.verdict: Fastest model. Excellent at language tasks but too agreeable (22%) and weak on code (44%). NEVER use for code review or compliance checks.

qwen-397b.verdict: Paradox: huge model but poor accuracy. Only good at nuance detection. Avoid for most tasks.

general.rationale: Top 3 by accuracy with architecture diversity (Mistral, Meta, Qwen). All >95%.

code_review.rationale: All 100% on code. AVOID kimi-k2 (44%) and qwen-397b (0%) for code tasks.

compliance.rationale: All 100% on nuance + agreeableness. Won't false-pass violations.

reasoning.rationale: All 100% on reasoning. MiniMax also 100% but too slow (11.7s).

arbiter.rationale: 100% across all 7 categories. Use as single tiebreaker when panels disagree.

complementary_weaknesses.kimi-k2_blind_spot: agreeableness=22%, code=44% — too agreeable, won't catch violations
complementary_weaknesses.qwen-397b_blind_spot: code=0%, agreeableness=33% — huge model, poor judgment
complementary_weaknesses.minimax-m2.5_blind_spot: nuance=0% — thinking doesn't help with subtle violations

key_insights.size_not_accuracy: qwen-397b (397B params, 58% acc) vs qwen-80b (80B params, 95% acc). Bigger ≠ better.
key_insights.speed_not_accuracy: kimi-k2 (0.6s, 79%) vs qwen-80b (0.7s, 95%). Similar speed, very different capability.
key_insights.thinking_not_nuance: MiniMax M2.5 thinks deeply but scores 0% on nuance. Chain-of-thought ≠ judgment.
key_insights.mistral_large_is_gold: Only model at 100% across all categories. Use as arbiter, not first-pass.

routing_rules: Code tasks: NEVER include kimi-k2 or qwen-397b
Compliance/behavioral: ALWAYS include llama-3.3 (best at nuance + agreeableness)
Disagreement arbitration: escalate to mistral-large alone (100% arbiter)
MiniMax M2.5: factual tiebreaker ONLY, never for nuance/compliance
2-stage: fast panel first → if split → general panel → if still split → arbiter
